subcodes.first_line: The letters of praise and the subtleties of glorification belong unto the holy and intimate sanctuary of that Sovereign Lord Who, through His grace [3.5s]... ...My God, My Master, My Desire! …Thou hast created this atom of dust through the consummate power of Thy might
subcodes.first_line_orig: احرف حمد حقایق و دقایق حمد مخصوص ساحت قدس قرب حضرت سلطانیست که از لطایف
subcodes.subjects: @creation of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
